title: Separate portfolio & events photos, fix customer visibility on Find Organisers page

requirements.text: Ensure portfolio images and events photos are completely separate data sections in the backend. Portfolio images (portfolio_images field on OrganizerProfile) must never appear in the events photos section, and event photos (EventPhoto type stored per event) must never appear in the portfolio section.

quotes: Portfolio image is going in events photos

acceptanceCriteria: Portfolio images are stored only in OrganizerProfile.portfolio_images
Event photos are stored only under their respective events (EventPhoto records)
No query or update method returns portfolio images in place of event photos or vice versa

requirements.text: Fix the OrganizerCard component and its associated lightbox/gallery (EventPhotoLightbox) in the Find Organisers page so that clicking the 'View' button on an organiser card shows that organiser's events photos (EventPhoto records), not their portfolio images.

quotes: events photos is not visible for customers in find organisers page
preview, in that button view work

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'View' on an organiser card in the Find Organisers page (GuestOrganizerBrowsing) opens a gallery/lightbox showing only that organiser's event photos
Portfolio images do not appear in this lightbox
If the organiser has no event photos uploaded, the lightbox/gallery shows an appropriate empty state message

requirements.text: In the Organiser Dashboard (OrganizerDashboard), ensure the events photos upload section (EventPhotoUpload) is a dedicated, clearly labelled section separate from the portfolio images upload section (PortfolioUpload). Organisers must be able to upload, view, and delete events photos independently from portfolio images after their profile is created.

quotes: it's uploaded by organisers after making the profile
Events photos are uploaded by organisers within their event management section after profile creation

acceptanceCriteria: OrganizerDashboard has a clearly labelled 'Events Photos' section separate from 'Portfolio Images'
The Events Photos section uses EventPhotoUpload and only reads/writes event photos
The Portfolio Images section uses PortfolioUpload and only reads/writes portfolio images
No cross-contamination of images between the two sections

requirements.text: In the OrganizerProfileView component, ensure the portfolio gallery section only displays portfolio images (portfolio_images) and does not render any event photos. Event photos should not appear anywhere in the read-only organiser profile view shown to customers.

quotes: Portfolio image is going in events photos

acceptanceCriteria: OrganizerProfileView portfolio gallery renders only portfolio_images from the organiser profile
Event photos are not shown in OrganizerProfileView
The portfolio gallery shows an empty state if no portfolio images exist

constraints: Do not change the existing data model for portfolio_images on OrganizerProfile or the EventPhoto type in the backend
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding a new events photos section visible inside the organiser profile view page for customers
Allowing customers to upload any images
Redesigning the overall Find Organisers page layout
